response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or secure embedded systems, with most recent work centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocol experience required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse technologies
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to deliver complex systems under agile and DevOps practices
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL development in the last 9 years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA protocols
No demonstrable experience with on-premises industrial automation platforms or real-time embedded systems
